title: EU gives Paramount's Warner Bros. acquisition the go-ahead - Engadget
summary: Regulators examined how the merger could impact things like film production, film distribution, media licensing and television broadcasting, and ultimately decided Paramount's future distribution business posed the largest risk to fair market competition.
caption: output/2026-07-22/eu-gives-paramount-s-warner-bros-acquisition-the-go-ahead-engadget.txt
